prompt: Create a polished anime-style bust portrait of a fashionable young woman centered on a plain white background. She has dark charcoal black with pale silver-white inner tips in a short layered bob, slightly messy and voluminous, with soft inward curls at the ends, loose side strands, and one visible ear on the right. Her face is intentionally obscured by a large vertical rectangular censor block filled with a smooth muted taupe-gray gradient, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving the hair, ear, chin edge, and clothing visible. She wears a fitted black ribbed turtleneck and an oversized glossy black leather trench coat with wide lapels, shoulder epaulets, visible seams, stitch details, and a single dark button; the coat has strong reflective highlights and deep shadow folds. Use clean high-resolution Japanese illustration rendering, crisp line art, subtle cel shading mixed with semi-realistic fabric highlights, cool monochrome palette, elegant street-fashion mood, front-facing three-quarter bust crop from chest upward, no text, no accessories, no background objects, no watermark.
